stack: "Pretendard Variable", Pretendard, -apple-system, system-ui, "Segoe UI", Roboto, "Helvetica Neue", Arial, "Noto Sans", sans-serif, "Apple Color Emoji", "Segoe UI Emoji", "Segoe UI Symbol", "Noto Color Emoji"
rationale: Pretendard is the de-facto KR/EN-pairing variable family for Korean SaaS in 2024-26 (also used by Toss, Karrot, Channel.io). Pairs hangul and latin glyphs with matched x-height — gives flex's tight 62.4px line-height on 52px display type its even rhythm.
